component.name: Tooltip
component.description: Show a brief text hint on hover or focus.

useCases: Keyboard shortcut hints on toolbar items

commonPatterns.name: basic-tooltip
commonPatterns.description: Simple text tooltip on a button

commonPatterns.name: with-shortcut
commonPatterns.description: Tooltip showing an action label and its keyboard shortcut

commonPatterns.name: provider-wrapping
commonPatterns.description: Wrap multiple tooltips in a single provider for shared delay

antiPatterns.reason: Tooltips dismiss on mouse leave and are not keyboard-navigable internally
antiPatterns.alternative: Use Popover for content that requires clicks or interaction

antiPatterns.scenario: Using Tooltip without a TooltipProvider ancestor
antiPatterns.reason: Tooltip requires the provider context to function; it will error without it
antiPatterns.alternative: Always wrap tooltips in a TooltipProvider (app-level or local)

antiPatterns.scenario: Long paragraphs of text inside a tooltip
antiPatterns.reason: Tooltips are for brief hints; long content is hard to read before it dismisses
antiPatterns.alternative: Use HoverCard or Popover for rich or lengthy content

antiPatterns.scenario: Tooltip on a disabled button without a wrapper
antiPatterns.reason: Disabled elements do not fire mouse events, so the tooltip never opens
antiPatterns.alternative: Wrap the disabled button in a span and attach the trigger to the wrapper

slots.TooltipTrigger: Element that activates the tooltip on hover/focus
slots.TooltipContent: The tooltip popup with text content and an arrow

composition.asChild: TooltipTrigger supports asChild to render as the child element

interactions.hover: Content appears on mouse enter (default delay 0ms)
interactions.focus: Content appears when trigger receives focus

responsive.mobile: Not triggered by hover; shows on long-press or focus on some devices
responsive.desktop: Appears on hover with configurable delay via TooltipProvider

accessibility.keyboardSupport: Focus on trigger shows tooltip; Escape dismisses
accessibility.screenReader: Content announced as tooltip text via aria-describedby
accessibility.focusManagement: Focus stays on trigger; content is in a portal

rules: Keep tooltip text short and descriptive
Use asChild on TooltipTrigger when wrapping an existing interactive element
TooltipContent includes an arrow by default
Kbd elements inside TooltipContent auto-adjust their colors

aiHints.context: Use for brief text hints on hover/focus. Requires TooltipProvider ancestor. TooltipContent renders in a portal with an arrow. Default delay is 0ms. For rich content use HoverCard; for interactive content use Popover. Kbd elements auto-style inside tooltips.
